title: Homemade Corn Tortillas
ingredients: 2 cups Maseca gluten free corn masa flour
instructions: Place corn masa flour in a bowl and add water.
Blend thoroughly with clean hands for about 5 minutes to make a dough.
Divide dough into about 18 balls, about 1 ounce each.
Cover dough balls to prevent drying out.
Line a tortilla press with plastic wrap.
Press each dough ball until tortilla is about 5 inches in diameter.
Cook each tortilla about 30 seconds per side, turning the tortilla 3 times.
notes: This recipe was taught in Guatemala, where tortillas are traditionally shaped by hand instead of using a tortilla press.
The Guatemalan method of hand-shaping the tortillas is an authentic alternative to using a press.
